name: Local NYC rule on disclosing AI use in federal court?
description: Disclose per judge orders—NY feds strict.[4]

mainEntity.name: Local NYC rule on disclosing AI use in federal court?

acceptedAnswer.text: Disclose per judge orders—NY feds strict.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Yes, many judges require AI disclosure/monitoring per standing orders.[4] S.D.NY *Heppner* context.

**Key factors:**
- Certify no hallucinations.
- Supervise duty.
- Sanctions for fakes.

Comply or risk; attorney handles. Check docket.[4] Transparent use.
